name: BEND SURGERY CENTER
address: 1342 NE MEDICAL CENTER DR, BEND, OR 97701

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness on the property could be facilitated by addressing the single access point and vehicle congestion in the parking area. Allocating additional entry or exit routes may support quicker emergency vehicle ingress and egress. Optimizing parking arrangements to minimize congestion could assist with maintaining clear pathways for emergency responders. Ensuring that the front entry area is easily navigable and unobstructed may enhance responder visibility and efficiency upon arrival. Managing the landscaped area to prevent obstruction of sight lines may further support emergency operations by enabling clear visibility and smoother navigation around the premises.

wildfire.recommendations: Managing vegetation adjacent to the structure by reducing the density and ensuring adequate separation between scattered shrubs could help improve defensible space and limit fuel continuity. The presence of open terrain offers a natural buffer that can support efforts in controlling fire spread, and maintaining its integrity could contribute to enhanced property preparedness. Regular trimming and strategic removal of shrubs immediately surrounding the structure may further decrease potential fire exposure. These actions, along with consistent monitoring to ensure shrubs do not encroach upon the structure, would support long-term resilience against wildfires.
